# Magnum Custom Publishing

> Professional book publishing services in New Delhi, India. Specialising in ghostwriting, editing, layout design, cover design, and end-to-end custom publishing solutions since 2005.

## About

Magnum Custom Publishing is a New Delhi-based publishing services company with over two decades of experience. Founded and led by Arvind Passey, the company serves individual authors, corporate clients, government agencies, think tanks, NGOs, and international organisations.

Services are delivered with a focus on quality, precision, and timeliness. The company has produced hundreds of publications across a wide range of genres and formats.

## Services

- **Ghostwriting** — Full-length book writing, content development, and author collaboration for individuals and organisations.
- **Editing & Proofreading** — Developmental editing, copy editing, line editing, and proofreading to publication standard.
- **Layout & Design** — Interior book layout, typesetting, and formatting for print and digital formats.
- **Cover Design** — Custom book cover design for all genres and markets.
- **Self-Publishing Support** — End-to-end assistance for authors choosing to self-publish.

## Portfolio Categories

- Government of India publications
- Think tanks, defence, and security organisations
- Global consultants and trade organisations
- Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) reports
- Climate change mitigation and adaptation
- Foreign language publications
- School books
- Children's books in regional languages
- Self-publishing projects
